acquisition method: data-dependent scanning was performed by Xcalibur
cleavage agent: with 12.5 ng/μL trypsin and 1.25 ng/μL chymotrypsin
fractionation method: were fractionated on an SDS-PAGE gel
fragmentation method: followed by collision-induced dissociation (CID) tandem mass spectrometry (MS/MS)
instrument: using a LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with an Advion nanomate ESI source
